jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Nykaa - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
